name: wilson-hexa-first
description: Inject the canonical `hexa-first` operating principle as additionalContext on SessionStart and PostCompact, so the agent always reads it once at the top of context (and again right after a summary lands). Pure text contributor — NO enforcement (the soft enforcement complement is `wilson-hexa-first-warn`, which warns at .py/.sh write time). The principle text is the verbatim port of wilson `plugins/principle-hexa-first/main.hexa::principle_hexa_first_text` — prefer the hexa-native path over an external CLI / non-hexa dep, absorbed intrinsics over forking a shell, the absorbed stdlib / atlas over hand-rolling; when the constraint lives in hexa-lang itself fix it there PR-only via `hexa atlas register` → `hexa atlas pr` (direct fold-to-live forbidden). Injects nothing else; one event, one block. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_HEXA_FIRST=1 (or WILSON_NO_HEXA_FIRST=1).
